ddls:
CREATE TABLE "smoking_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "age_group" INTEGER /* Age group of the population */,
  "smoke_cigars_pipe" INTEGER /* Number of people who smoke cigars or pipes */,
  "smoke_both" INTEGER /* Number of people who smoke both cigars/pipes and cigarettes */,
  "smoke_cigarettes" INTEGER /* Number of people who smoke cigarettes */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the age group */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in the age group */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "smoking_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of smoking (e.g., daily, occasionally) */,
  "average_cigarettes_per_day" INTEGER /* Average number of cigarettes smoked per day */,
  "average_cigars_pipes_per_day" INTEGER /* Average number of cigars or pipes smoked per day */,
  "quit_smoking" TEXT /* Date when individuals quit smoking */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population */,
  "smoking_start_age" INTEGER /* Age at which individuals started smoking */,
  "smoking_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of smoking in years */,
  "smoking_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of smoking (e.g., light, moderate, heavy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_data_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the region */,
  "smoking_laws" TEXT /* Smoking laws in the region */,
  "healthcare_quality" TEXT /* Quality of healthcare services in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the region data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages in the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the age group */,
  "health_indicators" TEXT /* Key health indicators for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_habits" (
  "habit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking habit */,
  "habit_name" TEXT /* Name of the smoking habit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the smoking habit */,
  "habit_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the smoking habit */,
  "habit_prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence of the smoking habit in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file for integrity */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES smoking_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for detailed access logs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES smoking_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the analysis is based on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "results_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_contributors" TEXT /* Names of the contributors to the analysis */,
  "analysis_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search and categorization */,
  "analysis_impact" TEXT /* Impact or findings of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES smoking_data ("data_id")
)
